visual_description: A young person with dark hair and tattered clothes is depicted falling down a steep, rocky cliff face. The panel shows three distinct moments of their descent, with dust and debris indicating impacts. The setting is a dark, overgrown natural environment, captured in a vertical wide shot.

ocr_text: ...SHIT!! / I CAN'T MOVE... MY LEG ANYMORE...!
visual_description: A person with dark purple hair, wearing torn white and blue clothing, is collapsed on their hands and knees on a dark, dusty ground. Their face is obscured by their hair, and they appear to be in distress, with dirt and debris scattered around them. It is a medium close-up shot.

A close-up shot focuses on a character's intense pink eye and dark purple hair. The character's face shows signs of dirt or injury, with a determined or surprised expression. Smoke or dust surrounds the character, obscuring the background.

A person is shown in a medium close-up, kneeling on the ground with their hands clenched into fists. Their clothing is torn at the wrist, and dirt specks are visible on their skin and clothes. A speech bubble above them reads, 'DAMN IT ALL...'

A young person in light, tattered clothing stands in the middle of a desolate, cracked ground, holding a white object. Two figures in dark, hooded cloaks are partially visible in the foreground on the left and right edges. The shot is a wide view, showing the central figure from a distance.
